notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Davis Schneider to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch grounds into a double play, first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to shortstop Ernie Clement. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Michael Busch out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Louis Varland.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds out, second baseman Davis Schneider to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds into a double play, pitcher Ryan Rolison to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Myles Straw out at 2nd. Nathan Lukes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto plunked
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Kazuma Okamoto hit by pitch. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement pops out to shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Kirk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Kirk singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ian Happ. Myles Straw scores. George Springer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement lines out to left fielder Ian Happ.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Louis Varland.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Louis Varland.
